# Shagun Tiwari | Product Manager | Scaling SaaS & Marketplace

Portfolio of Shagun Tiwari, a Product Manager shaping user-centered decisions into shipped outcomes with clarity and impact across B2B SaaS and Fintech.

## Core Expertise
- Product Strategy & Roadmapping
- User Research & Contextual Interviews
- Marketplace Dynamics & Liquidity
- B2B SaaS Workflow Simplification
- Cross-functional Leadership & Execution

## Professional Experience
- **CloudHire (Growth)**: Re-architecting talent-matching criteria and scaling remote hiring platforms.
- **Dice (Marketplace)**: Delivering streamlined user workflows and feature optimizations for a high-growth environment.
- **EnKash (Fintech)**: Simplifying complex B2B payment dashboards and transactional flows for mid-market clients.

## Technical Details
- Built with: Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- Animations: GSAP, Framer Motion, Lenis (Smooth Scroll)
- UI: Three.js integration for architectural visual elements
